# Math Check

## Inline Math
Here is an inline equation: $E = mc^2$, and another one with a fraction: $\frac{1}{2}$.

## Display Math
Here is a display equation:
$$
\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
$$

## Aligned Environment
$$
\begin{align}
a &= b + c \\
&= d + e
\end{align}
$$

## Matrices
$$
\begin{pmatrix}
1 & 2 \\
3 & 4
\end{pmatrix}
$$
